aPropos.heroDesc: Your trusted partner for real estate in Africa
aPropos.missionText: IMORA AFRICA's mission is to democratize access to secure real estate in Africa, particularly for the diaspora. We simplify every step of the process, from plot purchase to construction and property management.
aPropos.visionText: To become the benchmark for transparent and secure real estate in West Africa. Real estate without hassle, where every transaction is protected, every project is delivered on time, and every investor can track their property in real time.
aPropos.val1Text: All our land is verified. All our prices are displayed. All our transactions are notarized.
aPropos.val2Text: Mandatory Land Title, systematic verification, certified partners. Zero compromise on legal security.
aPropos.val3Text: From the first visit to the handover of keys, our team accompanies you at every step of your project.

simulation.heroDesc: Estimate the cost of your real estate project in 3 simple steps
simulation.step3Desc: Would you like to add property management to your project?
simulation.recapDisclaimer: This summary is an estimate. Contact IMORA for a precise quote.
simulation.successDesc: Our team will review your project and contact you within 24 hours.
